title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, my dear trainer! The vaunted day is upon us!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby, which some refer to as the
Tokyo Yushun...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Has sold out! It will be a live orchestra, and the
lineup is replete with this year's brightest stars!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, their only purpose is to make me shine
all the more brighter!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, this young Overlord's reign shall last
forever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just coming to the Derby has already gotten her
amped up. We head for the paddock side by side.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ayabe. I see you've positioned yourself on
the board well to make it here.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What say you? For this momentous occasion, will
you not join me in a song before the race?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...No. I'm not going along with your shtick. But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't pin the blame on you anymore either.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Blame? Whatever do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, I... I couldn't bear responsibility
for myself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So I played the victim. That's why I couldn't finish
strong.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But today... I'm focusing inward.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm here... because I want to run. I'll win this Derby
through my own will.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Interesting... So that is your mindset.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are indeed the Umamusume I thought you
were. I'm sure you agree, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More deflection and laughter... I don't think she
understands Admire Vega's feelings all that well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I'm glad to see the fire in your eyes!
You are a worthy rival, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Show me what you can do! Are you simply a
supporting role or...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you the comrade who joins me in the battle
against the older generation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The plot for today's act is yet to be written! Its
fate lies within our strides.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, to victory!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe's changed. She hated talking to Opera O
when they first met, but now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She stood up for herself—with determination too.
Wow... It's going to be a good race.
